## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or hard today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. For a **new provider/transport**, link the vendor's wire
protocol / API docs and note whether it's a distinct client (D) or a thin wrapper
(W) over an existing family (see `PROVIDERS.md`).
